extraction.one_line_summary: BAUHAUS Phil won the sprint from the left side while FDJ and Bahrain focused on marking KRISTOFF Alexander.
tactical_patterns: Team Sunweb committed to chase with two riders from 20km despite BAUHAUS having just finished Giro d'Italia.
BOUWMAN Koen tactically abandoned breakaway 25km from finish after securing mountain points, revealing polka jersey prioritization over stage.
Sprint trains marking KRISTOFF Alexander left opposite side vulnerable, BAUHAUS exploited spatial blindspot from the left.

rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: positive: Won stage two days after completing Giro, indicating exceptional recovery capacity for multi-race campaigns
rider_signals.BOUWMAN Koen: positive: Third breakaway of race week for mountains jersey, showing sustained effort capacity despite accumulated fatigue
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: Second place despite green jersey suggests FDJ sprint train misfocused on KRISTOFF rather than optimal positioning
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: neutral: Drew opponent focus but failed to capitalize, teams now over-calibrated to mark him
